S.FORM: I 1992 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Hassan Rouhani , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Iran anini i ci Hassan Rouhani, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 4 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ńßassan ro~uo~u~uńßani , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u iran anini i ¶i ńßassan ro~uo~u~uńßani, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1992 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Hassan Rouhani , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Iran anini i ci Hassan Rouhani, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 4 a romi'ad.
